message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.cond wrapper parity (franken_numpy-8snj)

Add fnp_python.cond(x, p=None) as a passthrough delegator to
np.linalg.cond so the seven valid p values (None, 1, -1, 2, -2,
'fro', inf, -inf) and batched (..., M, N) broadcasting match numpy
exactly across real and complex inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with seven scenarios: well-
conditioned 2x2 at default p, p=1/-1/2/-2 (loop), p='fro', p=inf,
and a complex128 2x2 at default p. Each compared via numpy.isclose
against np.linalg.cond.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
